description_long: This object is a plush, humanoid stuffed toy with a large, rounded head and a small, proportionate body. Its surface is textured to resemble a dark brown, stitched fabric, with visible white stitching running vertically along the side and top of the head, giving it a patchwork appearance. The face features two large, round white eyes and a simple, stitched black mouth, creating a friendly and approachable look. The limbs are short and slightly bent, with the hands and feet defined by subtle stitching. A long, pink, rectangular object is attached to or positioned in front of the toy, possibly representing an accessory or prop. The overall design is reminiscent of a handmade or crafted doll, with a whimsical and playful aesthetic.
description: A dark brown, stitched humanoid stuffed toy with large white eyes and a pink rectangular accessory, featuring a patchwork design and a friendly expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large white eyes, stitched mouth, and the pink rectangular accessory directly in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the vertical white stitching on the head and the profile of the pink accessory.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with the white stitching running down the head and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the white stitching and the pink accessory from a different angle.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round white eyes and a simple stitched black mouth. There are no eyebrows or other features indicating strong emotion.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the sides and legs apart, head facing forward.
